messages.content: Mujhe apne future ki chintaa hai, kya karoongi?
Aapki chintaa ko samajhne ki koshish karta hoon. Aap apne bhavishya ke bare mein kya jaanna chahti hain? Koi vishesh area hai jismein aapko sahayta chahiye?
Mujhe lagta hai ki mera future andhera hai, kuchh bhi sahi nahi ho raha

Aapke ehsaas ko samajhna zaroori hai. Yeh samay aapke liye kathin ho sakta hai, lekin yeh bhi yaad rakhein ki har din naya avsar laata hai. Aap apne aas-paas ke logon se baat kar sakti hain, unse sahayta le sakti hain ya phir kisi trusted friend ya counsellor se baat kar sakti hain.
Kya koi upaay hai jo mujhe theek karne mein madad kar sake?

Ji haan, kuchh supportive practices hain jo aapko madad kar sakti hain. Jaise ki meditation, yoga, ya phir kisi hobby mein samay bitana. Yeh aapke man ko shaanti aur sakaratmakta pradaan kar sakte hain. Lekin yaad rakhein, yeh sirf supportive practices hain, aur aapke jeevan ki samasyaon ka samadhan sirf aap khud hi dhoondh sakti hain.
Mujhe thoda tension hai, kya aap kuchh suggest kar sakte hain?

Tension ko door karne ke liye aap kuchh gahri saans len, ya phir kisi shaant jagah par baithkar apne vicharon ko shaanti se soch sakti hain. Agar aapko lagta hai ki aapki tension health se related hai, to main aapko kisi professional se milne ki salah dena chahta hoon, jaise ki ek doctor ya counsellor.
